title: Aznos's TrollUtils
description: TrollUtils is a plugin that lets you mess with your friends or server members through a variety of options. From scrambling inventories to fake creeper hisses to imprisioning players, perfect for adding a bit of fun to your server
body:
## How to use
`/troll <player>` opens the trollUI

## Features

	•	Inventory Swapper: Randomly scrambles the items in a players inventory
	•	Creeper Hiss: Plays a creeper hiss sound near a player
	•	Explosive Cake: Spawns a cake that explodes when eaten
	•	Lift: Lifts a player into the air
	•	Jail: Imprisons a player in a cage of iron bars
	•	Random Teleport: Teleports a player to a random location nearby

## Permissions

To ensure control over who can use these fun tricks, the plugin uses permissions for each trolling action:

	•	trollutils.inventoryswapper: Allows the use of the Inventory Swapper troll.
	•	trollutils.creeperhiss: Allows the use of the Creeper Hiss troll.
	•	trollutils.explosivecake: Allows the use of the Explosive Cake troll.
	•	trollutils.lift: Allows the use of the Lift troll.
	•	trollutils.jail: Allows the use of the Jail troll.
	•	trollutils.teleport: Allows the use of the Random Teleport troll.
